svg.title: Expense Agent Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing user input flowing through transcription, intent classification, LangGraph routing into three parallel flows: Log Expense, Summary, and Analysis.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does voice input get transcribed?')
sendPrompt('When does transcription happen in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does intent classification work with an LLM?')
sendPrompt('What is LangGraph and how does routing work?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Log Expense flow?')
sendPrompt('How is the expense stored in Notion?')
sendPrompt('What kind of response does the expense log return?')
sendPrompt('How does the Summary flow fetch data?')
sendPrompt('What does the summary response look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the Analysis flow fetch data?')
sendPrompt('How is expense data transformed for analysis?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM analyze expense data?')
sendPrompt('What does the analysis response include?')
